creator: gerhard@bigfoot.de
text:
Thanks for reminding me that a diff is the correct form to submit a
ports update. Here it is.

I hope simply replying to freebsd-gnats-submit will work, so I can avoid
the web interface.

Gerhard

diff -ruN py-pyPgSQL.orig/Makefile py-pyPgSQL/Makefile
--- py-pyPgSQL.orig/Makefile	Fri Nov  2 16:00:28 2001
+++ py-pyPgSQL/Makefile	Fri Nov  9 22:19:19 2001
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=      pyPgSQL
-PORTVERSION=   1.6
+PORTVERSION=   2.0
 CATEGORIES=    databases python
 MASTER_SITES=  ${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR= pypgsql
@@ -29,6 +29,8 @@
 
 DATETIME_DEP=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/mx/DateTime/__init__.py
 
+DOCDIR=		${PREFIX}/share/doc/py-pyPgSQL
+
 post-patch:
 	perl -i -p \
 		-e 's#^include_dirs  = \[ "/usr/local/pgsql/include" \]#include_dirs  = [ "${LOCALBASE}/include/pgsql" ]# ;' \
@@ -39,11 +41,11 @@
 	${SETUP_CMD} build_ext --inplace
 
 do-install:
-	${SETUP_CMD} install
+	${SETUP_CMD} install -c -O1
 .if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
-	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
+	@${MKDIR} ${DOCDIR}
 .for file in ${DOCS}
-	@${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/${file} ${DOCSDIR}
+	@${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/${file} ${DOCDIR}
 .endfor
 .endif
 
diff -ruN py-pyPgSQL.orig/distinfo py-pyPgSQL/distinfo
--- py-pyPgSQL.orig/distinfo	Fri Nov  2 16:00:28 2001
+++ py-pyPgSQL/distinfo	Fri Nov  9 22:19:19 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (pypgsql-1.6.tar.gz) = 3804f543cbe6cb2805eecc4c44913aea
+MD5 (pypgsql-2.0.tar.gz) = b3671864f8cddc5cfe89c4d1c365295a
diff -ruN py-pyPgSQL.orig/pkg-plist py-pyPgSQL/pkg-plist
--- py-pyPgSQL.orig/pkg-plist	Fri Nov  2 16:00:28 2001
+++ py-pyPgSQL/pkg-plist	Fri Nov  9 22:19:19 2001
@@ -1,6 +1,15 @@
-%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/libpqmodule.so
-%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/PgSQL.py
-%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/PgSQL.pyc
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/pyPgSQL/__init__.py
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/pyPgSQL/__init__.pyc
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/pyPgSQL/__init__.pyo
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/pyPgSQL/PgSQL.py
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/pyPgSQL/PgSQL.pyc
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/pyPgSQL/PgSQL.pyo
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/pyPgSQL/libpq/__init__.py
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/pyPgSQL/libpq/__init__.pyc
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/pyPgSQL/libpq/__init__.pyo
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/pyPgSQL/libpq/libpqmodule.so
 %%PORTDOCS%%share/doc/py-pyPgSQL/README
+@dirrm %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/pyPgSQL/libpq
+@dirrm %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/pyPgSQL
 @dirrm %%PORTDOCS%%share/doc/py-pyPgSQL
